SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.viewmodel

Class ScanDisplayViewModel

java.lang.Object
androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.viewmodel.ScanDisplayViewModel
public class ScanDisplayViewModel extends ViewModel
ViewModel for saved-scan detail UI state, including facts loading, favorites, and notes.

  • Method Details

    • getUiState

      public LiveData<ScanDisplayViewModel.UiState> getUiState()
      Returns:
      Combined UI state for scan detail rendering.

    • getMessageEvent

      public LiveData<ScanDisplayViewModel.UiMessage> getMessageEvent()
      Returns:
      One-shot UI message events for transient feedback.

    • loadScan

      public void loadScan(long scanId)
      Loads and observes scan detail state for the specified scan id.
      Parameters:
      scanId - Scan id to load.

    • setSelectedTab

      public void setSelectedTab(ScanDisplayViewModel.ContentTab tab)
      Selects which detail tab content should be shown.
      Parameters:
      tab - Desired content tab.

    • toggleFavorite

      public void toggleFavorite(boolean favorite)
      Persists favorite state for the current scan.
      Parameters:
      favorite - Favorite state selected by the user.

    • beginEditNote

      public void beginEditNote()
      Switches notes UI into edit mode with current saved note as draft.

    • updateNoteDraft

      public void updateNoteDraft(String value)
      Updates in-memory note draft text.
      Parameters:
      value - New draft text.

    • cancelEditNote

      public void cancelEditNote()
      Cancels note edits and restores saved note text.

    • saveNote

      public void saveNote()
      Saves current note draft for the active scan.
